title: Email & activities app - Send email to automated recipient and cc
excerpt:
Hello, 
Do you know if it is possible to automatically add the emails of recipients and cc when I start a new mail in the Email & Activities app (as it is possible to get fields from the board with {}) ? 
  
Thank you, 
C…

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Do you know if it is possible to automatically add the emails of recipients and cc when I start a new mail in the Email & Activities app (as it is possible to get fields from the board with {}) ?

image961×917 58.4 KB

Thank you,

Corentin

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @corentin.dalfarra !

There is not an automation to send an email through Emails and Activities, but you can set up an email to be sent through Gmail or Outlook.

You would go to your boards Integrations (with the outlet plug icon) and then go to Gmail or Outlook for email automations like this one:

Email Recipes1540×554 56 KB

From what I have seen, there is not an option to CC though. It just contains a “to” field.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jailynnlucidday

Thank you for the udpate, I will look at theses integrations.

Corentin
